item.title: DTCC, JPMorgan, BlackRock and Goldman complete first live tokenized stock and Treasury production trades in 40-firm RWA pilot.
GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking deadline arrives July 18 as OCC, FDIC, Treasury and FinCEN must finalize implementing rules.
Japan reclassifies crypto as financial instruments under investment law, opening path to spot Bitcoin ETF approvals and higher penalties.
White House holds high-level meeting on CLARITY Act ethics provisions as Senate targets floor vote for the week of July 20.
US-UK Transatlantic Taskforce aligns GENIUS Act stablecoin reserve standards with UK rules in 10-point framework; 54 firms committed.
CFTC chair announces partnership with SEC on Project Crypto to advance joint regulatory clarity for digital assets.
SEC adds Regulation Crypto to its July rulemaking agenda, proposing token offering exemptions and safe harbors for on-chain capital raises.
Trump presses Senate leadership on crypto market-structure and stablecoin bills ahead of August 7 congressional recess deadline.
Ostium liquidity vault on Arbitrum loses $18M in USDC after attacker exploits oracle infrastructure to manufacture profitable trades.
Goldman Sachs files for Bitcoin Premium Income ETF that sells covered call options to generate monthly income for investors.
CFTC approves KalshiEX to list BTCPERP, the first regulated Bitcoin perpetual futures contract referencing spot price in the US.
US spot Bitcoin ETFs record $197M weekly net inflows, snapping eight consecutive weeks of outflows; BlackRock IBIT led.
TRM Labs reports 207 crypto hacks in H1 2026, a record six-month total; losses fell to $972M from $2.3B in H1 2025.
Circle Arc testnet connects BlackRock, HSBC, Visa, Goldman Sachs and AWS to on-chain institutional financial workflow infrastructure.
